subject: fix(mobile): add persistent update banner outside overflow menu
body:
When the overflow menu was unreachable (z-index bug), users had no way
to trigger a PWA update without uninstalling/reinstalling. Add an
always-visible update banner below the header that doesn't depend on
the menu being accessible.

Tags: pwa, mobile, ui
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
